falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low equivalent (adjusted) would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a similar bottom formation but rather a continuation of the downtrend or a new breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear above the panic threshold would demonstrate that market stress is escalating beyond what occurred in August 2024's bottom, breaking the pattern similarity and indicating a more severe liquidation event rather than a tradable low

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid this extreme would signal recession/depression pricing rather than the soft-landing/growth-scare dynamic that characterized August 2024, invalidating the macro regime assumption embedded in the 79% pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
